tool_args.label: Long-Term SBS Improvements (2016-2017)

payload.description: Implement transit signal priority, construct bus bulbs at SBS stations south of Eastern Parkway, add real-time passenger information, new shelters, plantings, benches, curb extensions, pedestrian islands, high-visibility crosswalks, resurface Utica Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Implement transit signal priority • Construct bus bulbs at SBS stations south of Eastern Parkway • Add real-time passenger information, new shelters, plantings, and benches • Add curb extensions, pedestrian islands, and high-visibility crosswalks • Resurface Utica Avenue
Long-Term (2016-2017)

tool_args.label: Avenue H Bus Stop Relocation

payload.description: Propose to move Avenue H northbound stop from farside (NE corner) to nearside (SE corner) - currently in KFC driveways

evidence_refs.source_quote: Avenue H northbound stop currently in KFC driveways • Unwelcoming waiting environment for 2,600 bus riders who use stop daily • Propose to move from farside (NE corner) to nearside (SE corner) • Two new turnaround paths

payload.location_text: Utica Avenue / Flatlands Avenue / Avenue K intersection

evidence_refs.source_quote: Complicated intersection • Major transfer location between B46 and B82

Bus Bulbs at SBS Stops: A callout points to the bus stop area on the northbound side of Flatlands Avenue, where a bus stop is located. Expand island at B82 eastbound stop: A callout points to a pedestrian island located at the eastbound stop for B82 on Flatlands Avenue. Curb extensions to shorten crossing distances: A callout points to the southbound curb of Flatlands Avenue, indicating a proposed extension to shorten the crossing distance for pedestrians.
